Appearances:
Plaintiff, NINOSKA HERNANDEZ is present.
Attorney, JAMES MILLAR, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, LINDA MARTINEZ & RONNIE MARTINEZ, is present.
Attorney, JOHN LOUGH, JR., representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem MIKE LEE, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. , for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-18-2010 is vacated.
